top_signals.title: Kentucky Republican Thomas Massie is Trump revenge tour's next target
top_signals.summary: Rep. Thomas Massie will face off on Tuesday against a Trump-backed candidate in a Republican primary in Kentucky's 4th congressional district.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
